title: KAHEIGN 6Pcs Plastic Plant Pots, 13CM Thicken Flower Pot Root-Control Seedling Planter Nordic Style Garden Pots with Saucer for Flowers Herbs Succulents Cactus (3 Colors)
features: [High quality] Made of high-quality thicken resin plastic, not easy to crack and aging, and can last for several seasons in the sun without becoming brittle
[Nordic style] Clean lines appearance design and 3 different colors, perfectly blended with plants, easy to decorate garden, balcony, office and room
[Drainage well] There are drainage holes at the bottom to keep the soil drained and ventilated; The independent drainage tray can keep the soil moisture
[Size] Top diameter: 12.8cm, bottom diameter: 10cm, height: 11.5cm, can be placed on the table, window or any place you like, perfect for garden lovers!

[Applicable] Suitable for plants and flowers such as foliage plants, succulents, flowers, medicinal herbs with root development, such as roses, orchids, potos, cactus, herbs, aloe, morning glory, etc.
description: Product Description KAHEIGN No deformation and crack during extrusion Light weight, easy to handle The basin wall is smooth inside and outside, easy to clean Environmental material Basic principles for selecting flower pots It is necessary to choose a flower pot with good air permeability Because this kind of flower pot is only good for the root of the plant, not bad Hole Design and Tray Hole Design : Prevent rotting roots, which will make plants grow better Tray : It can catch excess water to reduce the dirt on the floor, and can effectively control water
